description.overview: The iconic shaggy dog, Old English Sheepdogs are gentle, playful companions. Their distinctive coat requires significant maintenance.
description.history: The Old English Sheepdog originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being adaptable, gentle, intelligent.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their profuse, shaggy double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The iconic shaggy dog, Old English Sheepdogs are gentle, playful companions. Their distinctive coat requires significant maintenance.
